differential_diagnoses: Severe vitamin B6 deficiency with peripheral neuropathy
next_steps: Complete an autoimmune/vasculitis workup including rheumatoid factor, anti-CCP, ANCA, cryoglobulins, and serum complement levels
Perform a sural nerve and gastrocnemius muscle biopsy for histological evaluation of vasculitis
Repeat MRI of the cervical and lumbar spine with sedation/pain management to ensure high-quality images
Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis (protein, cells, and cytology)
Continue vitamin B6 replacement and monitor for clinical response
Evaluate for underlying malignancy given constitutional symptoms and rapid decline

differential_diagnoses: Severe vitamin B6 deficiency with peripheral neuropathy
next_steps: Complete an autoimmune/vasculitis workup including rheumatoid factor, anti-CCP, ANCA, cryoglobulins, and serum complement levels
Perform a sural nerve and gastrocnemius muscle biopsy for histological evaluation of vasculitis
Repeat MRI of the cervical and lumbar spine with sedation to rule out occult spinal cord pathology
Lumbar puncture for CSF analysis including protein and cytology
Echocardiogram to evaluate for cardiac involvement or embolic sources
CT of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis to screen for occult malignancy
Initiate vitamin B6 replacement and monitor clinical response
Consult Rheumatology for joint aspiration and assessment of inflammatory arthritis
